texto: They eat the dainty food of famous chefs with the same pleasure with which they devour gross peasant dishes, mostly composed of garlic and tomatoes, or fisherman's octopus and shrimps, fried in heavily scented olive oil on a little deserted beach.
explicacao: Citação de Luigi Barzini sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “They eat the dainty food of famous chefs with the same pleasure with which they devour gross peas…” articula vida, food, beach em registro de vida, com relevância para contextos como beach e oil.
